- Bao zhi suo yin ji ying xiang shou lu fan wei: Tianjin ban (1902.06.17-1949.01.15) ; Shanghai ban (1936.04.01-1949.12.31) ; Chongqing ban (1938.12.01-1949.12.31) ; Xianggang ban (1938.08.13-1949.12.31) ; Guilin ban (1941.03.15-1944.09.09) ; Hankou ban (1937.09.18-1938.10.17) ; Chongqing Da gong wan bao (1944.09.01-1949.12.31)
報紙索引及影像收錄範圍: 天津版(1902.06.17-1949.01.15) ; 上海版(1936.04.01-1949.12.31) ; 重慶版(1938.12.01-1949.12.31) ; 香港版(1938.08.13-1949.12.31) ; 桂林版(1941.03.15-1944.09.09) ; 漢口版(1937.09.18-1938.10.17) ; 重慶大公晚報(1944.09.01-1949.12.31)

Bibliographic information
- Beginning date
- 2010s
- Title variation
- Da gong bao (1902-1949)
- 大公報 (1902-1949)
- Impartial
- Also known as: Ta kung pao full-text database
- Frequency
- Continually updated
- Note
- "繙云文献“
- "Fan yun wen xian"
- One of the oldest newspapers in China, Da gong bao (Ta kung pao = L'impartial) was founded in Tianjin in 1902, with several local editions published during the period of the Sino-Japanese War. The database includes the Tianjin, Shanghai, Hankou, Hong Kong, Guilin, and Chongqing editions. Display options: original image (full page or snippet), digitized text, or simultaneous. Download and print individual pages as image files or text files
- Note
- Other sub-databases are on free tiral until May 31, 2023.

title: Foreign Broadcast Information Service (FBIS) daily reports
current_description: SearchWorks is Stanford University Libraries' online catalog, providing access to books, journals, databases, digital collections, and special collections with significant holdings in Chinese and East...
source_text:
Foreign Broadcast Information Service (FBIS) daily reports [electronic resource] / Readex
Description
- Language
- English
- Imprint
- [Naples, FL] : Readex
Creators/Contributors
Contents/Summary
- Summary
- Comprised of the reports from Middle East and [North] Africa (MEA), ; Near East and South Asia (NES) ; South Asia (SAS) ; Sub-Saharan Africa (SSA), and (AFR) ; China (CHI); Asia and the Pacific (APA), 1941-1987; East Asia (EAS) ; Latin America (LAT and LAM) ; Eastern Europe (EEU) ; Soviet Union/Central Eurasia (SOV) ; Western Europe (WEU) ; FBIS Daily Report Annexes.
Subjects
Bibliographic information
- Beginning date
- 1941
- Ending date
- 1996
- Title variation
- FBIS daily reports
- Frequency
- Daily
- Vol/date range
- 1941-1996
- Format
- Mode of access: World Wide Web.
- Note
- Stanford libraries has access to all regions of FBIS starting in 1941, but it may be unclear from the interface because of the way that FBIS published its daily reports. From 1974 - 1996, the daily report was published by region. But prior to 1974, the daily report was published in digest format, with the possibility that each report could contain various regions rather than 1 specific region. Because of FBIS' publication style, Readex's publications series title doesn't show dates back to 1941. But the content is there, and can be found by searching the database and limiting to a year or date range.

title: China 2000 township population census data with maps 中国2000年乡镇人口普查资料与地图 on CD
current_description: SearchWorks is Stanford University Libraries' online catalog, providing access to books, journals, databases, digital collections, and special collections with significant holdings in Chinese and East...
source_text:
Collection
Zhongguo 2000 nian xiang zhen ren kou pu cha zi liao yu di tu [electronic resource] = China 2000 township population census data with maps
中国2000年乡镇人口普查资料与地图 [electronic resource] = China 2000 township population census data with maps
Description
- Language
- Chinese, English. In Chinese and English.
- Imprint
- [Beijing] : All China Marketing Research Co. ; Ann Arbor, MI : Distributed by University of Michigan, China Data Center, [2005]
Creators/Contributors
Contents/Summary
- Contents
-
- v. 1 & 2 : Chongging, Ganzu, Guangxi, Hainan, Heilongjinag, Jiangxi, Jilin, Liaoning, Neimengguo, Ningxia, Qinghai, Tianjin, Xinjiang, Xizang, Anhi, Guangdong, Hebei, Henan, Hubei, Shandong, Shanghai, Beijing, Guizhou, Shanxi, Shaanxi, Sichuan, Yunnan, Zhejiang
- v.3: Fujian, Hunan, Jiangsu.
- v.1 & 2: 重慶，甘肅，廣西，海南， 黑龍江， 江西， 吉林， 遼寧， 内蒙古， 寧夏， 青海，天津，新疆，西藏，安徽， 廣東，河北，河南，湖北，山東，上海，北京， 貴州，山西，陝西，四川，雲南，浙江
- v.2 : 福建，湖南，江蘇.
- Summary
- Includes 2000 township GIS maps with about 2,000 variables from 2000 population Census data for all townships. The GIS map layers include: (1) 2000 township map with population census data (1:1 million); (2) 2000 county boundary map; (3) 2000 provincial boundary map; (4) 2000 county capital point map; (5) 2000 prefecture city capital point map; (6) 2000 provincial capital point map; (7) Highway; (8) National Road; (9) Provincial Trunk Road; (10) Railways; (11) Rivers; and (12) Coast lines.
Subjects
Bibliographic information
- Publication date
- 2005
- Title variation
- China 2000 township population census data with maps
- Title from China Data Center web site: 2000 China township population census data with GIS maps

- Note

- "CDC-S-2005-130."
- Format

title: Country information: IMF reports and publications arranged by country
current_description: SearchWorks is Stanford University Libraries' online catalog, providing access to books, journals, databases, digital collections, and special collections with significant holdings in Chinese and East...
source_text:
Summary
This resource is a part of the larger IMF website. It contains IMF reports, including the IMF country reports series, and publications arranged alphabetically by country. Includes: annual meetings speeches; Article IV staff reports; heavily indebted poor countries (HIPC) documents; joint staff assessments; joint staff advisory notes; International Monetary and Financial Committee (IMFC) statements; letters of intent; news briefs; policy framework papers; poverty reduction strategy papers (PRSP); press releases; public information notices (PIN); staff papers; transcripts; surveys; and other publications.

title: History of the Communist Party of China database 中共党史经典文献数据库

source_text:
Zhong gong dang shi jing dian wen xian shu ju ku = History of the Communist Party of China database
中共党史经典文献数据库 = History of the Communist Party of China database
Description
- Responsibility
- Gu lang yuan jing (Beijing) ke ji fa zhan you xian gong si
- 谷浪远景(北京)科技发展有限公司.
- Language
- Chinese. Contents in Chinese; search interface in simplified Chinese with some English
- Publication
- Beijing : Gu lang yuan jing (Beijing) ke ji fa zhan you xian gong si, 2017

Creators/Contributors
- Contributor
- Gu lang yuan jing (Beijing) ke ji fa zhan you xian gong si, issuing body.
- 谷浪远景(北京)科技发展有限公司, issuing body.
- Ren min chu ban she, publisher.
- 人民出版社, publisher.
- Zhong yang wen xian chu ban she, publisher.

- 中共中央文献研究室.
Contents/Summary
- Summary
- The 'History of the Communist Party of China database' provides biographical information and selected works of the Party's central leadership, and includes documents of Party and government policy decisions and records of major events. It contains more than 200 volumes of full-text works, including compilations of documents from the 12th-18th National Congress of the CPC, and multi-volume selections of important materials published since the founding of the Party and the People's Republic of China
- " 'Zhong gong dang shi jing dian wen xian shu ju ku' yi dang de zhong yao li shi wen xian dang an, li ci dang dai hui zhong yao wen xian, zhong yang ling dao ren ji lao yi bei ge ming jia de zhu zuo, zi zhuan, nian pu, shou gao, dang he guo jia zhong da jue ce he zhong da shi jian yi shou wen xian ji lu, dang de shi er da zhi shi ba da yi lai zhong yao wen xian hui bian, shi yi jie san zhong quan hui yi lai zhong yao yi shou wen xian zi liao xuan bian deng wei zhu yao nei rong. Quan ku gong shou lu tu shu 200 yu juan, zong ti liang yue 1.8 yi zi, shi zheng que zong jie li shi jing yan de quan wei xing dang shi zi yuan shu ju ku. Dui yu shen ru guan che 'Zhong gong zhong yang guan yu jia qiang he gai jin xin xing shi xia dang shi gong zuo de yi jian' he quan guo dang shi gong zuo hui yi jing shen,dui yu guang da dang yuan gan bu qun zhong you qi shi zhong gao ji ling dao gan bu zheng que ren shi dang de li shi,xue xi dang shi guo shi, jin yi bu tong yi si xiang fa hui zhong yao zuo yong." -- chan pin jian jie
"《中共党史经典文献数据库》以党的重要历史文献档案，历次党代会重要文献，中央领导人及老一辈革命家的著作、自传、年谱、手稿，党和国家重大决策和重大事件一手文献记录，党的十二大至十八大以来重要文献汇编，十一届三中全会以来重要一手文献资料选编等为
